revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Draft_article_check here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Draft_article_check for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#if:{{{demospace|}}}|On [[:{{#switch:{{{demospace}}}|Main=|#default={{{demospace|}}}:}}{{{1}}}]]:{{space}}}}<!--
-->{{#switch:{{{demospace|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}
 |<!--Mainspace-->
 |Main  = <!-- Should not currently be used in mainspace -->
 |Talk  = {{#ifexist:Draft:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{n.b.|20px}} There is a [[Wikipedia:Drafts|draft]] named [[Draft:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]].}}
 |Draft talk
 |Draft = {{#switch:{{#ifexist:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}|yes
     |Redirect
     |Article
     }}
    |No
   }}
   |Article  = {{n.b.|20px}} There is already an article named [[{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]] in the [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]].
   |Redirect = {{n.b.|20px}} The page {{no redirect|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}} in the [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]] is currently a redirect to [[{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]].
   |No       =
  }}
 |User talk = 
 |User = {{#switch:{{#ifexist:{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}}}|yes
     |Redirect
     |Article
     }}
    |No
   }}
   |Article  = {{n.b.|20px}} There is already an article named [[{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}]] in the [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]].
   |Redirect = {{n.b.|20px}} The page {{no redirect|{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}}} in the [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]] is currently a redirect to [[{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}}}]].
   |No       =
  }}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Draft_article_check for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#if:{{{demospace|}}}|On [[:{{#switch:{{{demospace}}}|Main=|#default={{{demospace|}}}:}}{{{1}}}]]:{{space}}}}{{#switch:{{{demospace|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}
 |
 |Main  = 
 |Talk  = {{#ifexist:Draft:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{n.b.|20px}} There is a [[Wikipedia:Drafts|draft]] named [[Draft:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]].}}
 |Draft talk
 |Draft = {{#switch:{{#ifexist:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}|yes
     |Redirect
     |Article
     }}
    |No
   }}
   |Article  = {{n.b.|20px}} There is already an article named [[{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]] in the [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]].
   |Redirect = {{n.b.|20px}} The page {{no redirect|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}} in the [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]] is currently a redirect to [[{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]].
   |No       =
  }}
 |User talk = 
 |User = {{#switch:{{#ifexist:{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}}}|yes
     |Redirect
     |Article
     }}
    |No
   }}
   |Article  = {{n.b.|20px}} There is already an article named [[{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}]] in the [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]].
   |Redirect = {{n.b.|20px}} The page {{no redirect|{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}}} in the [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]] is currently a redirect to [[{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{{1|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}}}]].
   |No       =
  }}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
